6.3 按文件懒启动 LSP client

Section titled “6.3 按文件懒启动 LSP client”
1const getClients = Effect.fnUntraced(function* (file: string) {Effect 异步工作流。2  const ctx = yield* InstanceState.context等待 Effect 结果。3  if (!containsPath(file, ctx)) return [] as LSPClient.Info[]处理语言服务诊断。4  const s = yield* InstanceState.get(state)等待 Effect 结果。5  return yield* Effect.promise(async () => {Effect 异步工作流。6    const extension = path.parse(file).ext || file开始解析命令参数。7    const result: LSPClient.Info[] = []处理语言服务诊断。89    for (const server of Object.values(s.servers)) {遍历集合。10      if (server.extensions.length && !server.extensions.includes(extension)) continue按条件进入分支。1112      const root = await server.root(file, ctx)13      if (!root) continue按条件进入分支。14      if (s.broken.has(root + server.id)) continue按条件进入分支。1516      const match = s.clients.find((x) => x.root === root && x.serverID === server.id)17      if (match) {按条件进入分支。18        result.push(match)19        continue20      }2122      const inflight = s.spawning.get(root + server.id)23      if (inflight) {按条件进入分支。24        const client = await inflight25        if (!client) continue按条件进入分支。26        result.push(client)27        continue28      }2930      const task = schedule(server, root, root + server.id)31      s.spawning.set(root + server.id, task)32      const client = await task33      if (!client) continue按条件进入分支。3435      result.push(client)36      await Bus.publish(ctx, Event.Updated, {})广播状态变化。37    }3839    return result返回给上一层。40  })41})

路径：packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:211-299

packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:211-299 
211    const getClients = Effect.fnUntraced(function* (file: string) {Effect 异步工作流。212      const ctx = yield* InstanceState.context等待 Effect 结果。213      if (!containsPath(file, ctx)) return [] as LSPClient.Info[]处理语言服务诊断。214      const s = yield* InstanceState.get(state)等待 Effect 结果。215      return yield* Effect.promise(async () => {Effect 异步工作流。216        const extension = path.parse(file).ext || file开始解析命令参数。217        const result: LSPClient.Info[] = []处理语言服务诊断。218219        async function schedule(server: LSPServer.Info, root: string, key: string) {处理语言服务诊断。220          const handle = await server221            .spawn(root, ctx, flags)222            .then((value) => {223              if (!value) s.broken.add(key)按条件进入分支。224              return value返回给上一层。225            })226            .catch((err) => {227              s.broken.add(key)228              log.error(`Failed to spawn LSP server ${server.id}`, { error: err })处理语言服务诊断。229              return undefined返回给上一层。230            })231232          if (!handle) return undefined按条件进入分支。233          log.info("spawned lsp server", { serverID: server.id, root })234235          const client = await LSPClient.create({处理语言服务诊断。236            serverID: server.id,237            server: handle,238            root,239            directory: ctx.directory,240            instance: ctx,241          }).catch(async (err) => {242            s.broken.add(key)243            await Process.stop(handle.process)244            log.error(`Failed to initialize LSP client ${server.id}`, { error: err })处理语言服务诊断。245            return undefined返回给上一层。246          })247248          if (!client) return undefined按条件进入分支。249250          const existing = s.clients.find((x) => x.root === root && x.serverID === server.id)251          if (existing) {按条件进入分支。252            await Process.stop(handle.process)253            return existing返回给上一层。254          }255256          s.clients.push(client)257          return client返回给上一层。258        }259260        for (const server of Object.values(s.servers)) {遍历集合。261          if (server.extensions.length && !server.extensions.includes(extension)) continue按条件进入分支。262263          const root = await server.root(file, ctx)264          if (!root) continue按条件进入分支。265          if (s.broken.has(root + server.id)) continue按条件进入分支。266267          const match = s.clients.find((x) => x.root === root && x.serverID === server.id)268          if (match) {按条件进入分支。269            result.push(match)270            continue271          }272273          const inflight = s.spawning.get(root + server.id)274          if (inflight) {按条件进入分支。275            const client = await inflight276            if (!client) continue按条件进入分支。277            result.push(client)278            continue279          }280281          const task = schedule(server, root, root + server.id)282          s.spawning.set(root + server.id, task)283284          task.finally(() => {285            if (s.spawning.get(root + server.id) === task) {按条件进入分支。286              s.spawning.delete(root + server.id)287            }288          })289290          const client = await task291          if (!client) continue按条件进入分支。292293          result.push(client)294          await Bus.publish(ctx, Event.Updated, {})广播状态变化。295        }296297        return result返回给上一层。298      })299    })

关键点：

  • 只处理 instance 内部文件：containsPath(file, ctx)。
  • 根据 extension 匹配 server。
  • 根据 server root function 找项目根。
  • 已有 client 直接复用。
  • 正在 spawn 的 client 复用 inflight promise，避免重复启动。
  • 启动失败会放入 broken，避免反复重试。

7. 核心源码逐段讲解

Section titled “7. 核心源码逐段讲解”

7.1 LSP service interface

Section titled “7.1 LSP service interface”
1export interface Interface {定义数据结构约束。2  readonly init: () => Effect.Effect<void>Effect 异步工作流。3  readonly status: () => Effect.Effect<Status[]>Effect 异步工作流。4  readonly hasClients: (file: string) => Effect.Effect<boolean>Effect 异步工作流。5  readonly touchFile: (input: string, diagnostics?: "document" | "full") => Effect.Effect<void>处理语言服务诊断。6  readonly diagnostics: () => Effect.Effect<Record<string, LSPClient.Diagnostic[]>>处理语言服务诊断。7  readonly hover: (input: LocInput) => Effect.Effect<any>Effect 异步工作流。8  readonly definition: (input: LocInput) => Effect.Effect<any[]>Effect 异步工作流。9  readonly references: (input: LocInput) => Effect.Effect<any[]>Effect 异步工作流。10  readonly implementation: (input: LocInput) => Effect.Effect<any[]>Effect 异步工作流。11  readonly documentSymbol: (uri: string) => Effect.Effect<(DocumentSymbol | Symbol)[]>Effect 异步工作流。12  readonly workspaceSymbol: (query: string) => Effect.Effect<Symbol[]>Effect 异步工作流。13  readonly prepareCallHierarchy: (input: LocInput) => Effect.Effect<any[]>Effect 异步工作流。14  readonly incomingCalls: (input: LocInput) => Effect.Effect<any[]>Effect 异步工作流。15  readonly outgoingCalls: (input: LocInput) => Effect.Effect<any[]>Effect 异步工作流。16}

路径：packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:123-138

packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:123-138 
123export interface Interface {定义数据结构约束。124  readonly init: () => Effect.Effect<void>Effect 异步工作流。125  readonly status: () => Effect.Effect<Status[]>Effect 异步工作流。126  readonly hasClients: (file: string) => Effect.Effect<boolean>Effect 异步工作流。127  readonly touchFile: (input: string, diagnostics?: "document" | "full") => Effect.Effect<void>处理语言服务诊断。128  readonly diagnostics: () => Effect.Effect<Record<string, LSPClient.Diagnostic[]>>处理语言服务诊断。129  readonly hover: (input: LocInput) => Effect.Effect<any>Effect 异步工作流。130  readonly definition: (input: LocInput) => Effect.Effect<any[]>Effect 异步工作流。131  readonly references: (input: LocInput) => Effect.Effect<any[]>Effect 异步工作流。132  readonly implementation: (input: LocInput) => Effect.Effect<any[]>Effect 异步工作流。133  readonly documentSymbol: (uri: string) => Effect.Effect<(DocumentSymbol | Symbol)[]>Effect 异步工作流。134  readonly workspaceSymbol: (query: string) => Effect.Effect<Symbol[]>Effect 异步工作流。135  readonly prepareCallHierarchy: (input: LocInput) => Effect.Effect<any[]>Effect 异步工作流。136  readonly incomingCalls: (input: LocInput) => Effect.Effect<any[]>Effect 异步工作流。137  readonly outgoingCalls: (input: LocInput) => Effect.Effect<any[]>Effect 异步工作流。138}

这个接口分三类：生命周期/状态、诊断、语义查询。

7.2 server 配置和自定义 LSP

Section titled “7.2 server 配置和自定义 LSP”
1if (!cfg.lsp) {按条件进入分支。2  log.info("all LSPs are disabled")处理语言服务诊断。3} else {4  for (const server of Object.values(LSPServer)) {处理语言服务诊断。5    servers[server.id] = server6  }78  filterExperimentalServers(servers, flags)910  if (cfg.lsp !== true) {按条件进入分支。11    for (const [name, item] of Object.entries(cfg.lsp)) {遍历集合。12      const existing = servers[name]13      if (item.disabled) {按条件进入分支。14        delete servers[name]15        continue16      }17      servers[name] = {18        ...existing,19        id: name,20        root: existing?.root ?? (async (_file, ctx) => ctx.directory),21        extensions: item.extensions ?? existing?.extensions ?? [],22        spawn: async (root) => ({23          process: lspspawn(item.command[0], item.command.slice(1), {处理命令执行。24            cwd: root,25            env: { ...process.env, ...item.env },26          }),27          initialization: item.initialization,28        }),29      }30    }31  }32}

路径：packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:154-185

packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:154-185 
154        if (!cfg.lsp) {按条件进入分支。155          log.info("all LSPs are disabled")处理语言服务诊断。156        } else {157          for (const server of Object.values(LSPServer)) {处理语言服务诊断。158            servers[server.id] = server159          }160161          filterExperimentalServers(servers, flags)162163          if (cfg.lsp !== true) {按条件进入分支。164            for (const [name, item] of Object.entries(cfg.lsp)) {遍历集合。165              const existing = servers[name]166              if (item.disabled) {按条件进入分支。167                log.info(`LSP server ${name} is disabled`)处理语言服务诊断。168                delete servers[name]169                continue170              }171              servers[name] = {172                ...existing,173                id: name,174                root: existing?.root ?? (async (_file, ctx) => ctx.directory),175                extensions: item.extensions ?? existing?.extensions ?? [],176                spawn: async (root) => ({177                  process: lspspawn(item.command[0], item.command.slice(1), {处理命令执行。178                    cwd: root,179                    env: { ...process.env, ...item.env },180                  }),181                  initialization: item.initialization,182                }),183              }184            }185          }

LSP 可以全关、使用内置 server，也可以通过配置覆盖/新增 server。这里的 spawn 是用户配置命令。

7.3 TypeScript language server 配置

Section titled “7.3 TypeScript language server 配置”
1export const Typescript: Info = {对外暴露模块成员。2  id: "typescript",3  root: NearestRoot(4    ["package-lock.json", "bun.lockb", "bun.lock", "pnpm-lock.yaml", "yarn.lock"],5    ["deno.json", "deno.jsonc"],6  ),7  extensions: [".ts", ".tsx", ".js", ".jsx", ".mjs", ".cjs", ".mts", ".cts"],8  async spawn(root, ctx) {9    const tsserver = Module.resolve("typescript/lib/tsserver.js", ctx.directory)10    if (!tsserver) return按条件进入分支。11    const bin = await Npm.which("typescript-language-server")12    if (!bin) return按条件进入分支。13    const proc = spawn(bin, ["--stdio"], {14      cwd: root,15      env: { ...process.env },16    })17    return {返回给上一层。18      process: proc,19      initialization: {20        tsserver: { path: tsserver },21      },22    }23  },24}

路径：packages/opencode/src/lsp/server.ts:94-121

packages/opencode/src/lsp/server.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/server.ts:94-121 
94export const Typescript: Info = {对外暴露模块成员。95  id: "typescript",96  root: NearestRoot(97    ["package-lock.json", "bun.lockb", "bun.lock", "pnpm-lock.yaml", "yarn.lock"],98    ["deno.json", "deno.jsonc"],99  ),100  extensions: [".ts", ".tsx", ".js", ".jsx", ".mjs", ".cjs", ".mts", ".cts"],101  async spawn(root, ctx) {102    const tsserver = Module.resolve("typescript/lib/tsserver.js", ctx.directory)103    log.info("typescript server", { tsserver })104    if (!tsserver) return按条件进入分支。105    const bin = await Npm.which("typescript-language-server")106    if (!bin) return按条件进入分支。107    const proc = spawn(bin, ["--stdio"], {108      cwd: root,109      env: {110        ...process.env,111      },112    })113    return {返回给上一层。114      process: proc,115      initialization: {116        tsserver: {117          path: tsserver,118        },119      },120    }121  },

Java 类比：这是一个 LanguageServerFactory，按文件扩展和项目根决定是否能服务。

7.4 创建 JSON-RPC client

Section titled “7.4 创建 JSON-RPC client”
1const connection = createMessageConnection(2  new StreamMessageReader(input.server.process.stdout as any),3  new StreamMessageWriter(input.server.process.stdin as any),4)

路径：packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts:152-155

packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts:152-155 
152  const connection = createMessageConnection(153    new StreamMessageReader(input.server.process.stdout as any),154    new StreamMessageWriter(input.server.process.stdin as any),155  )

LSP 本质是基于 stdin/stdout 的 JSON-RPC。OpenCode 启动 language server 进程，然后用 vscode-jsonrpc 建连接。

initialize 请求：

1const initialized = await withTimeout(2  connection.sendRequest<{ capabilities?: ServerCapabilities }>("initialize", {3    rootUri: pathToFileURL(input.root).href,4    processId: input.server.process.pid,5    workspaceFolders: [6      {7        name: "workspace",8        uri: pathToFileURL(input.root).href,9      },10    ],11    initializationOptions: {12      ...input.server.initialization,13    },14    capabilities: {15      workspace: {16        configuration: true,17        didChangeWatchedFiles: { dynamicRegistration: true },18        diagnostics: { refreshSupport: false },处理语言服务诊断。19      },20      textDocument: {21        synchronization: { didOpen: true, didChange: true },22        diagnostic: { dynamicRegistration: true, relatedDocumentSupport: true },处理语言服务诊断。23        publishDiagnostics: { versionSupport: false },处理语言服务诊断。24      },25    },26  }),27  INITIALIZE_TIMEOUT_MS,28)

路径：packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts:248-290

packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts:248-290 
248  logger.info("sending initialize")249  const initialized = await withTimeout(250    connection.sendRequest<{ capabilities?: ServerCapabilities }>("initialize", {251      rootUri: pathToFileURL(input.root).href,252      processId: input.server.process.pid,253      workspaceFolders: [254        {255          name: "workspace",256          uri: pathToFileURL(input.root).href,257        },258      ],259      initializationOptions: {260        ...input.server.initialization,261      },262      capabilities: {263        window: {264          workDoneProgress: true,265        },266        workspace: {267          configuration: true,268          didChangeWatchedFiles: {269            dynamicRegistration: true,270          },271          diagnostics: {处理语言服务诊断。272            refreshSupport: false,273          },274        },275        textDocument: {276          synchronization: {277            didOpen: true,278            didChange: true,279          },280          diagnostic: {处理语言服务诊断。281            dynamicRegistration: true,282            relatedDocumentSupport: true,283          },284          publishDiagnostics: {处理语言服务诊断。285            versionSupport: false,286          },287        },288      },289    }),290    INITIALIZE_TIMEOUT_MS,

7.5 push diagnostics 和 pull diagnostics

Section titled “7.5 push diagnostics 和 pull diagnostics”

push diagnostics 来自 server 主动推送：

1connection.onNotification("textDocument/publishDiagnostics", (params) => {处理语言服务诊断。2  const filePath = getFilePath(params.uri)3  if (!filePath) return按条件进入分支。4  published.set(filePath, {5    at: Date.now(),6    version: typeof params.version === "number" ? params.version : undefined,7  })8  if (shouldSeedDiagnosticsOnFirstPush(input.serverID) && !pushDiagnostics.has(filePath)) {处理语言服务诊断。9    pushDiagnostics.set(filePath, params.diagnostics)处理语言服务诊断。10    return返回给上一层。11  }12  updatePushDiagnostics(filePath, params.diagnostics)处理语言服务诊断。13})

路径：packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts:191-208

packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts:191-208 
191  connection.onNotification("textDocument/publishDiagnostics", (params) => {处理语言服务诊断。192    const filePath = getFilePath(params.uri)193    if (!filePath) return按条件进入分支。194    logger.info("textDocument/publishDiagnostics", {处理语言服务诊断。195      path: filePath,196      count: params.diagnostics.length,处理语言服务诊断。197      version: params.version,198    })199    published.set(filePath, {200      at: Date.now(),201      version: typeof params.version === "number" ? params.version : undefined,202    })203    if (shouldSeedDiagnosticsOnFirstPush(input.serverID) && !pushDiagnostics.has(filePath)) {处理语言服务诊断。204      pushDiagnostics.set(filePath, params.diagnostics)处理语言服务诊断。205      return返回给上一层。206    }207    updatePushDiagnostics(filePath, params.diagnostics)处理语言服务诊断。208  })

pull diagnostics 是 OpenCode 主动请求：

1async function requestDiagnosticReport(filePath: string, identifier?: string): Promise<DiagnosticRequestResult> {定义一段可复用逻辑。2  const report = await withTimeout(3    connection.sendRequest<DocumentDiagnosticReport | null>("textDocument/diagnostic", {处理语言服务诊断。4      ...(identifier ? { identifier } : {}),5      textDocument: {6        uri: pathToFileURL(filePath).href,7      },8    }),9    DIAGNOSTICS_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS,10  ).catch(() => null)11  if (!report) return { handled: false, matched: false, byFile: new Map<string, Diagnostic[]>() }按条件进入分支。12  ...13}

路径：packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts:332-366

packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts:332-366 
332  async function requestDiagnosticReport(filePath: string, identifier?: string): Promise<DiagnosticRequestResult> {定义一段可复用逻辑。333    const report = await withTimeout(334      connection.sendRequest<DocumentDiagnosticReport | null>("textDocument/diagnostic", {处理语言服务诊断。335        ...(identifier ? { identifier } : {}),336        textDocument: {337          uri: pathToFileURL(filePath).href,338        },339      }),340      DIAGNOSTICS_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS,341    ).catch(() => null)342    if (!report) return { handled: false, matched: false, byFile: new Map<string, Diagnostic[]>() }按条件进入分支。343344    const byFile = new Map<string, Diagnostic[]>()345    const push = (target: string, items: Diagnostic[]) => {346      const existing = byFile.get(target) ?? []347      byFile.set(target, existing.concat(items))348    }349350    let handled = false351    let matched = false352    if (Array.isArray(report.items)) {按条件进入分支。353      push(filePath, report.items)354      handled = true355      matched = true356    }357    for (const [uri, related] of Object.entries(report.relatedDocuments ?? {})) {遍历集合。358      const relatedPath = getFilePath(uri)359      if (!relatedPath || !Array.isArray(related.items)) continue按条件进入分支。360      push(relatedPath, related.items)361      handled = true362      matched = matched || relatedPath === filePath363    }364365    return { handled, matched, byFile }返回给上一层。366  }

这解释了为什么 LSP diagnostics 逻辑比“读一个错误列表”复杂：有些 server push，有些支持 pull，有些动态注册 diagnostic capability。

7.6 touchFile

Section titled “7.6 touchFile”
1const touchFile = Effect.fn("LSP.touchFile")(function* (input: string, diagnostics?: "document" | "full") {处理语言服务诊断。2  const clients = yield* getClients(input)等待 Effect 结果。3  yield* Effect.promise(() =>Effect 异步工作流。4    Promise.all(并行等待多个任务。5      clients.map(async (client) => {6        const after = Date.now()7        const version = await client.notify.open({ path: input })8        if (!diagnostics) return处理语言服务诊断。9        return client.waitForDiagnostics({处理语言服务诊断。10          path: input,11          version,12          mode: diagnostics,处理语言服务诊断。13          after,14        })15      }),16    ).catch((err) => {17      log.error("failed to touch file", { err, file: input })18    }),19  )20})

路径：packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:346-366

packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:346-366 
346    const touchFile = Effect.fn("LSP.touchFile")(function* (input: string, diagnostics?: "document" | "full") {处理语言服务诊断。347      log.info("touching file", { file: input })348      const clients = yield* getClients(input)等待 Effect 结果。349      yield* Effect.promise(() =>Effect 异步工作流。350        Promise.all(并行等待多个任务。351          clients.map(async (client) => {352            const after = Date.now()353            const version = await client.notify.open({ path: input })354            if (!diagnostics) return处理语言服务诊断。355            return client.waitForDiagnostics({处理语言服务诊断。356              path: input,357              version,358              mode: diagnostics,处理语言服务诊断。359              after,360            })361          }),362        ).catch((err) => {363          log.error("failed to touch file", { err, file: input })364        }),365      )366    })

touchFile 做两件事：打开/变更文件，必要时等待诊断。它吞掉错误并记录日志，避免 LSP 故障直接让 edit/write 失败。

7.7 client.notify.open

Section titled “7.7 client.notify.open”
1async open(request: { path: string }) {2  request.path = Filesystem.normalizePath(3    path.isAbsolute(request.path) ? request.path : path.resolve(input.directory, request.path),4  )5  const text = await Filesystem.readText(request.path)6  const extension = path.extname(request.path)7  const languageId = LANGUAGE_EXTENSIONS[extension] ?? "plaintext"89  const document = files[request.path]10  if (document !== undefined) {按条件进入分支。11    await connection.sendNotification("workspace/didChangeWatchedFiles", {12      changes: [{ uri: pathToFileURL(request.path).href, type: FILE_CHANGE_CHANGED }],13    })14    const next = document.version + 115    files[request.path] = { version: next, text }16    await connection.sendNotification("textDocument/didChange", {17      textDocument: { uri: pathToFileURL(request.path).href, version: next },18      contentChanges: syncKind === TEXT_DOCUMENT_SYNC_INCREMENTAL19        ? [{ range: { start: { line: 0, character: 0 }, end: endPosition(document.text) }, text }]20        : [{ text }],21    })22    return next返回给上一层。23  }2425  await connection.sendNotification("textDocument/didOpen", {26    textDocument: {27      uri: pathToFileURL(request.path).href,28      languageId,29      version: 0,30      text,31    },32  })33  files[request.path] = { version: 0, text }34  return 0返回给上一层。35}

路径：packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts:594-669

packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts:594-669 
594    notify: {595      async open(request: { path: string }) {596        request.path = Filesystem.normalizePath(597          path.isAbsolute(request.path) ? request.path : path.resolve(input.directory, request.path),598        )599        const text = await Filesystem.readText(request.path)600        const extension = path.extname(request.path)601        const languageId = LANGUAGE_EXTENSIONS[extension] ?? "plaintext"602603        const document = files[request.path]604        if (document !== undefined) {按条件进入分支。605          // Do not wipe diagnostics on didChange. Some servers (e.g. clangd) only606          // re-emit diagnostics when the content actually changes, so clearing607          // here would lose errors for no-op touchFile calls. Let the server's608          // next push/pull overwrite naturally.609          logger.info("workspace/didChangeWatchedFiles", request)610          await connection.sendNotification("workspace/didChangeWatchedFiles", {611            changes: [612              {613                uri: pathToFileURL(request.path).href,614                type: FILE_CHANGE_CHANGED,615              },616            ],617          })618619          const next = document.version + 1620          files[request.path] = { version: next, text }621          logger.info("textDocument/didChange", {622            path: request.path,623            version: next,624          })625          await connection.sendNotification("textDocument/didChange", {626            textDocument: {627              uri: pathToFileURL(request.path).href,628              version: next,629            },630            contentChanges:631              syncKind === TEXT_DOCUMENT_SYNC_INCREMENTAL632                ? [633                    {634                      range: {635                        start: { line: 0, character: 0 },636                        end: endPosition(document.text),637                      },638                      text,639                    },640                  ]641                : [{ text }],642          })643          return next返回给上一层。644        }645646        logger.info("workspace/didChangeWatchedFiles", request)647        await connection.sendNotification("workspace/didChangeWatchedFiles", {648          changes: [649            {650              uri: pathToFileURL(request.path).href,651              type: FILE_CHANGE_CREATED,652            },653          ],654        })655656        logger.info("textDocument/didOpen", request)657        pushDiagnostics.delete(request.path)处理语言服务诊断。658        pullDiagnostics.delete(request.path)处理语言服务诊断。659        await connection.sendNotification("textDocument/didOpen", {660          textDocument: {661            uri: pathToFileURL(request.path).href,662            languageId,663            version: 0,664            text,665          },666        })667        files[request.path] = { version: 0, text }668        return 0返回给上一层。669      },

如果文件已经 open，就发 didChange；否则发 didOpen。这和 IDE 打开文件后编辑的行为一样。

7.8 diagnostics 聚合和格式化

Section titled “7.8 diagnostics 聚合和格式化”
1const diagnostics = Effect.fn("LSP.diagnostics")(function* () {处理语言服务诊断。2  const results: Record<string, LSPClient.Diagnostic[]> = {}处理语言服务诊断。3  const all = yield* runAll(async (client) => client.diagnostics)处理语言服务诊断。4  for (const result of all) {遍历集合。5    for (const [p, diags] of result.entries()) {遍历集合。6      const arr = results[p] || []7      arr.push(...diags)8      results[p] = arr9    }10  }11  return results返回给上一层。12})

路径：packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:368-379

packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:368-379 
368    const diagnostics = Effect.fn("LSP.diagnostics")(function* () {处理语言服务诊断。369      const results: Record<string, LSPClient.Diagnostic[]> = {}处理语言服务诊断。370      const all = yield* runAll(async (client) => client.diagnostics)处理语言服务诊断。371      for (const result of all) {遍历集合。372        for (const [p, diags] of result.entries()) {遍历集合。373          const arr = results[p] || []374          arr.push(...diags)375          results[p] = arr376        }377      }378      return results返回给上一层。379    })

格式化：

1export function report(file: string, issues: LSPClient.Diagnostic[]) {处理语言服务诊断。2  const errors = issues.filter((item) => item.severity === 1)3  if (errors.length === 0) return ""按条件进入分支。4  const limited = errors.slice(0, MAX_PER_FILE)5  const more = errors.length - MAX_PER_FILE6  const suffix = more > 0 ? `\n... and ${more} more` : ""7  return `<diagnostics file="${file}">\n${limited.map(pretty).join("\n")}${suffix}\n</diagnostics>`处理语言服务诊断。8}

路径：packages/opencode/src/lsp/diagnostic.ts:20-27

packages/opencode/src/lsp/diagnostic.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/diagnostic.ts:20-27 
20export function report(file: string, issues: LSPClient.Diagnostic[]) {处理语言服务诊断。21  const errors = issues.filter((item) => item.severity === 1)22  if (errors.length === 0) return ""按条件进入分支。23  const limited = errors.slice(0, MAX_PER_FILE)24  const more = errors.length - MAX_PER_FILE25  const suffix = more > 0 ? `\n... and ${more} more` : ""26  return `<diagnostics file="${file}">\n${limited.map(pretty).join("\n")}${suffix}\n</diagnostics>`处理语言服务诊断。27}

注意只报告 severity 为 1 的 errors，不把 warn/info/hint 都塞给模型。

8. 关键 TypeScript 语法复习

Section titled “8. 关键 TypeScript 语法复习”

as const

Section titled “as const”
1const operations = [2  "goToDefinition",3  "findReferences",4  "hover",5  ...6] as const

路径：packages/opencode/src/tool/lsp.ts:11-21

packages/opencode/src/tool/lsp.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/lsp.ts:11-21 
11const operations = [12  "goToDefinition",13  "findReferences",14  "hover",15  "documentSymbol",16  "workspaceSymbol",17  "goToImplementation",18  "prepareCallHierarchy",19  "incomingCalls",20  "outgoingCalls",21] as const

as const 让数组元素变成字面量类型，后面 Schema.Literals(operations) 可以生成 operation union。

interface

Section titled “interface”
1export interface Interface {定义数据结构约束。2  readonly init: () => Effect.Effect<void>Effect 异步工作流。3  readonly status: () => Effect.Effect<Status[]>Effect 异步工作流。4  ...5}

路径：packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:123-138

packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:123-138 
123export interface Interface {定义数据结构约束。124  readonly init: () => Effect.Effect<void>Effect 异步工作流。125  readonly status: () => Effect.Effect<Status[]>Effect 异步工作流。126  readonly hasClients: (file: string) => Effect.Effect<boolean>Effect 异步工作流。127  readonly touchFile: (input: string, diagnostics?: "document" | "full") => Effect.Effect<void>处理语言服务诊断。128  readonly diagnostics: () => Effect.Effect<Record<string, LSPClient.Diagnostic[]>>处理语言服务诊断。129  readonly hover: (input: LocInput) => Effect.Effect<any>Effect 异步工作流。130  readonly definition: (input: LocInput) => Effect.Effect<any[]>Effect 异步工作流。131  readonly references: (input: LocInput) => Effect.Effect<any[]>Effect 异步工作流。132  readonly implementation: (input: LocInput) => Effect.Effect<any[]>Effect 异步工作流。133  readonly documentSymbol: (uri: string) => Effect.Effect<(DocumentSymbol | Symbol)[]>Effect 异步工作流。134  readonly workspaceSymbol: (query: string) => Effect.Effect<Symbol[]>Effect 异步工作流。135  readonly prepareCallHierarchy: (input: LocInput) => Effect.Effect<any[]>Effect 异步工作流。136  readonly incomingCalls: (input: LocInput) => Effect.Effect<any[]>Effect 异步工作流。137  readonly outgoingCalls: (input: LocInput) => Effect.Effect<any[]>Effect 异步工作流。138}

Java 类比 interface，但 TS interface 只在编译期存在，运行时没有。

optional parameter

Section titled “optional parameter”
1readonly touchFile: (input: string, diagnostics?: "document" | "full") => Effect.Effect<void>处理语言服务诊断。

路径：packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:127

packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:127 
127  readonly touchFile: (input: string, diagnostics?: "document" | "full") => Effect.Effect<void>处理语言服务诊断。

diagnostics? 可以不传；如果传，只能是 "document" 或 "full"。

generic function

Section titled “generic function”
1const run = Effect.fnUntraced(function* <T>(file: string, fn: (client: LSPClient.Info) => Promise<T>) {处理语言服务诊断。2  const clients = yield* getClients(file)等待 Effect 结果。3  return yield* Effect.promise(() => Promise.all(clients.map((x) => fn(x))))Effect 异步工作流。4})

路径：packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:301-304

packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:301-304 
301    const run = Effect.fnUntraced(function* <T>(file: string, fn: (client: LSPClient.Info) => Promise<T>) {处理语言服务诊断。302      const clients = yield* getClients(file)等待 Effect 结果。303      return yield* Effect.promise(() => Promise.all(clients.map((x) => fn(x))))Effect 异步工作流。304    })

<T> 表示返回类型由传入函数决定。Java 类比 <T> List<T> run(String file, Function<Client, T> fn)。

getter

Section titled “getter”
1get diagnostics() {处理语言服务诊断。2  const result = new Map<string, Diagnostic[]>()3  ...4  return result返回给上一层。5}

路径：packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts:671-677

packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts:671-677 
671    get diagnostics() {处理语言服务诊断。672      const result = new Map<string, Diagnostic[]>()673      for (const key of new Set([...pushDiagnostics.keys(), ...pullDiagnostics.keys()])) {处理语言服务诊断。674        result.set(key, mergedDiagnostics(key))处理语言服务诊断。675      }676      return result返回给上一层。677    },

这是 JS/TS getter，调用时像属性：client.diagnostics。

Array flat/filter(Boolean)

Section titled “Array flat/filter(Boolean)”
1return results.flat().filter(Boolean)返回给上一层。

路径：packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:392-402

packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:392-402 
392    const definition = Effect.fn("LSP.definition")(function* (input: LocInput) {处理语言服务诊断。393      const results = yield* run(input.file, (client) =>等待 Effect 结果。394        client.connection395          .sendRequest("textDocument/definition", {396            textDocument: { uri: pathToFileURL(input.file).href },397            position: { line: input.line, character: input.character },398          })399          .catch(() => null),400      )401      return results.flat().filter(Boolean)返回给上一层。402    })

把多 client 结果拍平，并过滤 null/undefined。Java 类比 stream flatMap(...).filter(Objects::nonNull)。

discriminated switch

Section titled “discriminated switch”
1switch (args.operation) {2  case "goToDefinition":3    return lsp.definition(position)返回给上一层。4  case "findReferences":5    return lsp.references(position)返回给上一层。6  ...7}

路径：packages/opencode/src/tool/lsp.ts:82-103

packages/opencode/src/tool/lsp.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/lsp.ts:82-103 
82          const result: unknown[] = yield* (() => {等待 Effect 结果。83            switch (args.operation) {84              case "goToDefinition":85                return lsp.definition(position)返回给上一层。86              case "findReferences":87                return lsp.references(position)返回给上一层。88              case "hover":89                return lsp.hover(position)返回给上一层。90              case "documentSymbol":91                return lsp.documentSymbol(uri)返回给上一层。92              case "workspaceSymbol":93                return lsp.workspaceSymbol(args.query ?? "")返回给上一层。94              case "goToImplementation":95                return lsp.implementation(position)返回给上一层。96              case "prepareCallHierarchy":97                return lsp.prepareCallHierarchy(position)返回给上一层。98              case "incomingCalls":99                return lsp.incomingCalls(position)返回给上一层。100              case "outgoingCalls":101                return lsp.outgoingCalls(position)返回给上一层。102            }103          })()

operation 是 literal union，所以 switch 分支可被 TS 检查。

9. 涉及的设计模式和架构思想

Section titled “9. 涉及的设计模式和架构思想”
  • Lazy initialization：只在文件需要时启动 LSP client。
  • Factory：LSPServer.Info.spawn 创建不同 language server。
  • Registry：servers 和 clients 维护可用 server/client。
  • JSON-RPC adapter：LSPClient.create 封装 stdin/stdout connection。
  • Feedback loop：edit/write 后 diagnostics 回到 tool output，再进入下一轮 LLM。
  • Capability probing：initialize 后根据 capabilities 决定 diagnostics 路径。
  • Best-effort enhancement：touchFile 捕获错误记录日志，LSP 故障不应让文件编辑整体崩掉。

10. 它如何和 Tool、Provider、Session、文件系统协作

Section titled “10. 它如何和 Tool、Provider、Session、文件系统协作”

  • 和 Tool：edit/write 自动触发 diagnostics；lsp tool 暴露语义查询。来源：packages/opencode/src/tool/edit.ts:192-207、packages/opencode/src/tool/write.ts:80-99、packages/opencode/src/tool/lsp.ts:37-110。

    packages/opencode/src/tool/edit.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/edit.ts:192-207 
    192          let output = "Edit applied successfully."193          yield* lsp.touchFile(filePath, "document")等待 Effect 结果。194          const diagnostics = yield* lsp.diagnostics()处理语言服务诊断。195          const normalizedFilePath = AppFileSystem.normalizePath(filePath)读写本地文件。196          const block = LSP.Diagnostic.report(filePath, diagnostics[normalizedFilePath] ?? [])处理语言服务诊断。197          if (block) output += `\n\nLSP errors detected in this file, please fix:\n${block}`处理语言服务诊断。198199          return {返回给上一层。200            metadata: {201              diagnostics,处理语言服务诊断。202              diff,203              filediff,204            },205            title: `${path.relative(instance.worktree, filePath)}`,206            output,207          }
    packages/opencode/src/tool/write.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/write.ts:80-99 
    80            const current = file === normalizedFilepath81            if (!current && projectDiagnosticsCount >= MAX_PROJECT_DIAGNOSTICS_FILES) continue处理语言服务诊断。82            const block = LSP.Diagnostic.report(current ? filepath : file, issues)处理语言服务诊断。83            if (!block) continue按条件进入分支。84            if (current) {按条件进入分支。85              output += `\n\nLSP errors detected in this file, please fix:\n${block}`处理语言服务诊断。86              continue87            }88            projectDiagnosticsCount++处理语言服务诊断。89            output += `\n\nLSP errors detected in other files:\n${block}`处理语言服务诊断。90          }9192          return {返回给上一层。93            title: path.relative(instance.worktree, filepath),94            metadata: {95              diagnostics,处理语言服务诊断。96              filepath,97              exists: exists,98            },99            output,
    packages/opencode/src/tool/lsp.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/lsp.ts:37-110 
    37export const LspTool = Tool.define(声明可调用工具。38  "lsp",39  Effect.gen(function* () {Effect 异步工作流。40    const lsp = yield* LSP.Service处理语言服务诊断。41    const fs = yield* AppFileSystem.Service读写本地文件。42    return {返回给上一层。43      description: DESCRIPTION,44      parameters: Parameters,45      execute: (args: Schema.Schema.Type<typeof Parameters>, ctx: Tool.Context) =>定义并校验数据形状。46        Effect.gen(function* () {Effect 异步工作流。47          const instance = yield* InstanceState.context等待 Effect 结果。48          const file = path.isAbsolute(args.filePath) ? args.filePath : path.join(instance.directory, args.filePath)49          yield* assertExternalDirectoryEffect(ctx, file)等待 Effect 结果。50          const meta =51            args.operation === "workspaceSymbol"52              ? { operation: args.operation }53              : args.operation === "documentSymbol"54                ? { operation: args.operation, filePath: file }55                : { operation: args.operation, filePath: file, line: args.line, character: args.character }56          yield* ctx.ask({进入权限审批。57            permission: "lsp",58            patterns: ["*"],59            always: ["*"],60            metadata: meta,61          })6263          const uri = pathToFileURL(file).href64          const position = { file, line: args.line - 1, character: args.character - 1 }65          const relPath = path.relative(instance.worktree, file)66          const detail =67            args.operation === "workspaceSymbol"68              ? ""69              : args.operation === "documentSymbol"70                ? relPath71                : `${relPath}:${args.line}:${args.character}`72          const title = detail ? `${args.operation} ${detail}` : args.operation7374          const exists = yield* fs.existsSafe(file)读写本地文件。75          if (!exists) throw new Error(`File not found: ${file}`)按条件进入分支。7677          const available = yield* lsp.hasClients(file)等待 Effect 结果。78          if (!available) throw new Error("No LSP server available for this file type.")处理语言服务诊断。7980          yield* lsp.touchFile(file, "document")等待 Effect 结果。8182          const result: unknown[] = yield* (() => {等待 Effect 结果。83            switch (args.operation) {84              case "goToDefinition":85                return lsp.definition(position)返回给上一层。86              case "findReferences":87                return lsp.references(position)返回给上一层。88              case "hover":89                return lsp.hover(position)返回给上一层。90              case "documentSymbol":91                return lsp.documentSymbol(uri)返回给上一层。92              case "workspaceSymbol":93                return lsp.workspaceSymbol(args.query ?? "")返回给上一层。94              case "goToImplementation":95                return lsp.implementation(position)返回给上一层。96              case "prepareCallHierarchy":97                return lsp.prepareCallHierarchy(position)返回给上一层。98              case "incomingCalls":99                return lsp.incomingCalls(position)返回给上一层。100              case "outgoingCalls":101                return lsp.outgoingCalls(position)返回给上一层。102            }103          })()104105          return {返回给上一层。106            title,107            metadata: { result },108            output: result.length === 0 ? `No results found for ${args.operation}` : JSON.stringify(result, null, 2),109          }110        }).pipe(Effect.orDie),Effect 异步工作流。

  • 和 Provider：Provider 不直接调用 LSP；LLM 通过 tool result 或主动 lsp tool 获取 LSP 信息。

  • 和 Session：diagnostics 被写进 tool output，成为 message history 的一部分，下一轮模型能看到。

  • 和文件系统：client.open 读取文件文本，发送 didOpen/didChange。来源：packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts:594-669。

    packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts:594-669 
    594    notify: {595      async open(request: { path: string }) {596        request.path = Filesystem.normalizePath(597          path.isAbsolute(request.path) ? request.path : path.resolve(input.directory, request.path),598        )599        const text = await Filesystem.readText(request.path)600        const extension = path.extname(request.path)601        const languageId = LANGUAGE_EXTENSIONS[extension] ?? "plaintext"602603        const document = files[request.path]604        if (document !== undefined) {按条件进入分支。605          // Do not wipe diagnostics on didChange. Some servers (e.g. clangd) only606          // re-emit diagnostics when the content actually changes, so clearing607          // here would lose errors for no-op touchFile calls. Let the server's608          // next push/pull overwrite naturally.609          logger.info("workspace/didChangeWatchedFiles", request)610          await connection.sendNotification("workspace/didChangeWatchedFiles", {611            changes: [612              {613                uri: pathToFileURL(request.path).href,614                type: FILE_CHANGE_CHANGED,615              },616            ],617          })618619          const next = document.version + 1620          files[request.path] = { version: next, text }621          logger.info("textDocument/didChange", {622            path: request.path,623            version: next,624          })625          await connection.sendNotification("textDocument/didChange", {626            textDocument: {627              uri: pathToFileURL(request.path).href,628              version: next,629            },630            contentChanges:631              syncKind === TEXT_DOCUMENT_SYNC_INCREMENTAL632                ? [633                    {634                      range: {635                        start: { line: 0, character: 0 },636                        end: endPosition(document.text),637                      },638                      text,639                    },640                  ]641                : [{ text }],642          })643          return next返回给上一层。644        }645646        logger.info("workspace/didChangeWatchedFiles", request)647        await connection.sendNotification("workspace/didChangeWatchedFiles", {648          changes: [649            {650              uri: pathToFileURL(request.path).href,651              type: FILE_CHANGE_CREATED,652            },653          ],654        })655656        logger.info("textDocument/didOpen", request)657        pushDiagnostics.delete(request.path)处理语言服务诊断。658        pullDiagnostics.delete(request.path)处理语言服务诊断。659        await connection.sendNotification("textDocument/didOpen", {660          textDocument: {661            uri: pathToFileURL(request.path).href,662            languageId,663            version: 0,664            text,665          },666        })667        files[request.path] = { version: 0, text }668        return 0返回给上一层。669      },

  • 和权限：lsp tool 会 ctx.ask({ permission: "lsp" })；外部路径还会走 external directory 检查。来源：packages/opencode/src/tool/lsp.ts:47-61。

    packages/opencode/src/tool/lsp.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/lsp.ts:47-61 
    47          const instance = yield* InstanceState.context等待 Effect 结果。48          const file = path.isAbsolute(args.filePath) ? args.filePath : path.join(instance.directory, args.filePath)49          yield* assertExternalDirectoryEffect(ctx, file)等待 Effect 结果。50          const meta =51            args.operation === "workspaceSymbol"52              ? { operation: args.operation }53              : args.operation === "documentSymbol"54                ? { operation: args.operation, filePath: file }55                : { operation: args.operation, filePath: file, line: args.line, character: args.character }56          yield* ctx.ask({进入权限审批。57            permission: "lsp",58            patterns: ["*"],59            always: ["*"],60            metadata: meta,61          })

11. 如果自己实现 mini agent，这一章对应什么代码

Section titled “11. 如果自己实现 mini agent，这一章对应什么代码”

mini agent 可以先实现“编辑后跑检查”的低配版，不必一开始接 LSP：

1async function afterEdit(file: string, ctx: ToolContext) {定义一段可复用逻辑。2  const diagnostics = await diagnosticsService.check(file)处理语言服务诊断。3  if (diagnostics.errors.length === 0) {处理语言服务诊断。4    return "Edit applied successfully."返回给上一层。5  }6  return [返回给上一层。7    "Edit applied successfully.",8    "",9    "Diagnostics detected, please fix:",处理语言服务诊断。10    formatDiagnostics(file, diagnostics.errors),处理语言服务诊断。11  ].join("\n")12}

再逐步升级：

  1. 用 tsc --noEmit 或 eslint 作为第一版 diagnostics。
  2. 接入一个 TypeScript language server。
  3. 实现 touchFile：open/change 文件。
  4. 实现 diagnostics() 聚合。
  5. 增加 definition/hover/references tool。
  6. 把 errors 写回 tool result，让下一轮 LLM 修。

12. 费曼复述区

Section titled “12. 费曼复述区”

请你不看源码复述：

  1. 为什么 edit/write 工具要在修改后调用 LSP？
  2. getClients 为什么要按文件扩展和 root 懒启动？
  3. touchFile 做了哪两件事？
  4. push diagnostics 和 pull diagnostics 的差异是什么？
  5. lsp tool 和 edit/write 自动 diagnostics 的关系是什么？

如果说不出来，常见卡点是：

  • 把 LSP 当成一次性 lint 命令，没有理解它是长期运行的 JSON-RPC server。
  • 只看 lsp.diagnostics()，没看 touchFile 如何让 server 更新状态。
  • 没把 diagnostics 回填到 tool output 和下一轮 LLM 联系起来。

换一种说法：LSP 是 agent 的“IDE 感官”。agent 可以写代码，但 LSP 让它知道自己刚才写出来的代码有没有被语言服务认可。

13. 练习题

Section titled “13. 练习题”

入门题

Section titled “入门题”
  1. 找到 LSP.Interface，把方法分成 lifecycle、diagnostics、semantic query 三类。
  2. 找到 Typescript server，说明它支持哪些文件扩展。
  3. 找到 Diagnostic.report，说明它为什么只输出 error。

进阶题

Section titled “进阶题”
  1. 阅读 getClients，解释 clients、spawning、broken 三个状态集合的用途。
  2. 阅读 client.notify.open，解释 didOpen 和 didChange 的差异。
  3. 阅读 waitForDocumentDiagnostics，说明它如何同时等待 push 和 pull。

源码追踪题

Section titled “源码追踪题”
  1. 从 EditTool 的 lsp.touchFile 追到 client.notify.open。
  2. 从 WriteTool 的 diagnostics 输出追到 Diagnostic.report。
  3. 从 LspTool.execute 追到 lsp.definition 和 connection.sendRequest("textDocument/definition")。
  4. 从 LSPServer.Typescript.spawn 追到 LSPClient.create。

小实现题

Section titled “小实现题”

写一个 mini diagnostics service：

  • touchFile(file)：记录文件版本。
  • diagnostics()：返回 { [file]: Diagnostic[] }。
  • report(file, diagnostics)：只输出 error。
  • 在 edit tool 修改后调用它，并把结果追加到 tool output。

14. 源码追踪任务

Section titled “14. 源码追踪任务”

建议按这个顺序读：

  1. packages/opencode/src/tool/edit.ts:192-207

[])处理语言服务诊断。197          if (block) output += `\n\nLSP errors detected in this file, please fix:\n${block}`处理语言服务诊断。198199          return {返回给上一层。200            metadata: {201              diagnostics,处理语言服务诊断。202              diff,203              filediff,204            },205            title: `${path.relative(instance.worktree, filePath)}`,206            output,207          }
  1. packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:346-379
packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:346-379 
346    const touchFile = Effect.fn("LSP.touchFile")(function* (input: string, diagnostics?: "document" | "full") {处理语言服务诊断。347      log.info("touching file", { file: input })348      const clients = yield* getClients(input)等待 Effect 结果。349      yield* Effect.promise(() =>Effect 异步工作流。350        Promise.all(并行等待多个任务。351          clients.map(async (client) => {352            const after = Date.now()353            const version = await client.notify.open({ path: input })354            if (!diagnostics) return处理语言服务诊断。355            return client.waitForDiagnostics({处理语言服务诊断。356              path: input,357              version,358              mode: diagnostics,处理语言服务诊断。359              after,360            })361          }),362        ).catch((err) => {363          log.error("failed to touch file", { err, file: input })364        }),365      )366    })367368    const diagnostics = Effect.fn("LSP.diagnostics")(function* () {处理语言服务诊断。369      const results: Record<string, LSPClient.Diagnostic[]> = {}处理语言服务诊断。370      const all = yield* runAll(async (client) => client.diagnostics)处理语言服务诊断。371      for (const result of all) {遍历集合。372        for (const [p, diags] of result.entries()) {遍历集合。373          const arr = results[p] || []374          arr.push(...diags)375          results[p] = arr376        }377      }378      return results返回给上一层。379    })
  1. packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:211-299
packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/lsp.ts:211-299 
211    const getClients = Effect.fnUntraced(function* (file: string) {Effect 异步工作流。212      const ctx = yield* InstanceState.context等待 Effect 结果。213      if (!containsPath(file, ctx)) return [] as LSPClient.Info[]处理语言服务诊断。214      const s = yield* InstanceState.get(state)等待 Effect 结果。215      return yield* Effect.promise(async () => {Effect 异步工作流。216        const extension = path.parse(file).ext || file开始解析命令参数。217        const result: LSPClient.Info[] = []处理语言服务诊断。218219        async function schedule(server: LSPServer.Info, root: string, key: string) {处理语言服务诊断。220          const handle = await server221            .spawn(root, ctx, flags)222            .then((value) => {223              if (!value) s.broken.add(key)按条件进入分支。224              return value返回给上一层。225            })226            .catch((err) => {227              s.broken.add(key)228              log.error(`Failed to spawn LSP server ${server.id}`, { error: err })处理语言服务诊断。229              return undefined返回给上一层。230            })231232          if (!handle) return undefined按条件进入分支。233          log.info("spawned lsp server", { serverID: server.id, root })234235          const client = await LSPClient.create({处理语言服务诊断。236            serverID: server.id,237            server: handle,238            root,239            directory: ctx.directory,240            instance: ctx,241          }).catch(async (err) => {242            s.broken.add(key)243            await Process.stop(handle.process)244            log.error(`Failed to initialize LSP client ${server.id}`, { error: err })处理语言服务诊断。245            return undefined返回给上一层。246          })247248          if (!client) return undefined按条件进入分支。249250          const existing = s.clients.find((x) => x.root === root && x.serverID === server.id)251          if (existing) {按条件进入分支。252            await Process.stop(handle.process)253            return existing返回给上一层。254          }255256          s.clients.push(client)257          return client返回给上一层。258        }259260        for (const server of Object.values(s.servers)) {遍历集合。261          if (server.extensions.length && !server.extensions.includes(extension)) continue按条件进入分支。262263          const root = await server.root(file, ctx)264          if (!root) continue按条件进入分支。265          if (s.broken.has(root + server.id)) continue按条件进入分支。266267          const match = s.clients.find((x) => x.root === root && x.serverID === server.id)268          if (match) {按条件进入分支。269            result.push(match)270            continue271          }272273          const inflight = s.spawning.get(root + server.id)274          if (inflight) {按条件进入分支。275            const client = await inflight276            if (!client) continue按条件进入分支。277            result.push(client)278            continue279          }280281          const task = schedule(server, root, root + server.id)282          s.spawning.set(root + server.id, task)283284          task.finally(() => {285            if (s.spawning.get(root + server.id) === task) {按条件进入分支。286              s.spawning.delete(root + server.id)287            }288          })289290          const client = await task291          if (!client) continue按条件进入分支。292293          result.push(client)294          await Bus.publish(ctx, Event.Updated, {})广播状态变化。295        }296297        return result返回给上一层。298      })299    })
  1. packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts:594-692
packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts:594-692 
594    notify: {595      async open(request: { path: string }) {596        request.path = Filesystem.normalizePath(597          path.isAbsolute(request.path) ? request.path : path.resolve(input.directory, request.path),598        )599        const text = await Filesystem.readText(request.path)600        const extension = path.extname(request.path)601        const languageId = LANGUAGE_EXTENSIONS[extension] ?? "plaintext"602603        const document = files[request.path]604        if (document !== undefined) {按条件进入分支。605          // Do not wipe diagnostics on didChange. Some servers (e.g. clangd) only606          // re-emit diagnostics when the content actually changes, so clearing607          // here would lose errors for no-op touchFile calls. Let the server's608          // next push/pull overwrite naturally.609          logger.info("workspace/didChangeWatchedFiles", request)610          await connection.sendNotification("workspace/didChangeWatchedFiles", {611            changes: [612              {613                uri: pathToFileURL(request.path).href,614                type: FILE_CHANGE_CHANGED,615              },616            ],617          })618619          const next = document.version + 1620          files[request.path] = { version: next, text }621          logger.info("textDocument/didChange", {622            path: request.path,623            version: next,624          })625          await connection.sendNotification("textDocument/didChange", {626            textDocument: {627              uri: pathToFileURL(request.path).href,628              version: next,629            },630            contentChanges:631              syncKind === TEXT_DOCUMENT_SYNC_INCREMENTAL632                ? [633                    {634                      range: {635                        start: { line: 0, character: 0 },636                        end: endPosition(document.text),637                      },638                      text,639                    },640                  ]641                : [{ text }],642          })643          return next返回给上一层。644        }645646        logger.info("workspace/didChangeWatchedFiles", request)647        await connection.sendNotification("workspace/didChangeWatchedFiles", {648          changes: [649            {650              uri: pathToFileURL(request.path).href,651              type: FILE_CHANGE_CREATED,652            },653          ],654        })655656        logger.info("textDocument/didOpen", request)657        pushDiagnostics.delete(request.path)处理语言服务诊断。658        pullDiagnostics.delete(request.path)处理语言服务诊断。659        await connection.sendNotification("textDocument/didOpen", {660          textDocument: {661            uri: pathToFileURL(request.path).href,662            languageId,663            version: 0,664            text,665          },666        })667        files[request.path] = { version: 0, text }668        return 0返回给上一层。669      },670    },671    get diagnostics() {处理语言服务诊断。672      const result = new Map<string, Diagnostic[]>()673      for (const key of new Set([...pushDiagnostics.keys(), ...pullDiagnostics.keys()])) {处理语言服务诊断。674        result.set(key, mergedDiagnostics(key))处理语言服务诊断。675      }676      return result返回给上一层。677    },678    async waitForDiagnostics(request: { path: string; version: number; mode?: "document" | "full"; after?: number }) {处理语言服务诊断。679      const normalizedPath = Filesystem.normalizePath(680        path.isAbsolute(request.path) ? request.path : path.resolve(input.directory, request.path),681      )682      logger.info("waiting for diagnostics", {处理语言服务诊断。683        path: normalizedPath,684        mode: request.mode ?? "full",685        version: request.version,686      })687      if (request.mode === "document") {按条件进入分支。688        await waitForDocumentDiagnostics({ path: normalizedPath, version: request.version, after: request.after })处理语言服务诊断。689        return返回给上一层。690      }691      await waitForFullDiagnostics({ path: normalizedPath, version: request.version, after: request.after })处理语言服务诊断。692    },
  1. packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts:191-208
packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts packages/opencode/src/lsp/client.ts:191-208 
191  connection.onNotification("textDocument/publishDiagnostics", (params) => {处理语言服务诊断。192    const filePath = getFilePath(params.uri)193    if (!filePath) return按条件进入分支。194    logger.info("textDocument/publishDiagnostics", {处理语言服务诊断。195      path: filePath,196      count: params.diagnostics.length,处理语言服务诊断。197      version: params.version,198    })199    published.set(filePath, {200      at: Date.now(),201      version: typeof params.version === "number" ? params.version : undefined,202    })203    if (shouldSeedDiagnosticsOnFirstPush(input.serverID) && !pushDiagnostics.has(filePath)) {处理语言服务诊断。204      pushDiagnostics.set(filePath, params.diagnostics)处理语言服务诊断。205      return返回给上一层。206    }207    updatePushDiagnostics(filePath, params.diagnostics)处理语言服务诊断。208  })

332  async function requestDiagnosticReport(filePath: string, identifier?: string): Promise<DiagnosticRequestResult> {定义一段可复用逻辑。333    const report = await withTimeout(334      connection.sendRequest<DocumentDiagnosticReport | null>("textDocument/diagnostic", {处理语言服务诊断。335        ...(identifier ? { identifier } : {}),336        textDocument: {337          uri: pathToFileURL(filePath).href,338        },339      }),340      DIAGNOSTICS_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS,341    ).catch(() => null)342    if (!report) return { handled: false, matched: false, byFile: new Map<string, Diagnostic[]>() }按条件进入分支。343344    const byFile = new Map<string, Diagnostic[]>()345    const push = (target: string, items: Diagnostic[]) => {346      const existing = byFile.get(target) ?? []347      byFile.set(target, existing.concat(items))348    }349350    let handled = false351    let matched = false352    if (Array.isArray(report.items)) {按条件进入分支。353      push(filePath, report.items)354      handled = true355      matched = true356    }357    for (const [uri, related] of Object.entries(report.relatedDocuments ?? {})) {遍历集合。358      const relatedPath = getFilePath(uri)359      if (!relatedPath || !Array.isArray(related.items)) continue按条件进入分支。360      push(relatedPath, related.items)361      handled = true362      matched = matched || relatedPath === filePath363    }364365    return { handled, matched, byFile }返回给上一层。366  }367368  async function requestWorkspaceDiagnosticReport(定义一段可复用逻辑。369    filePath: string,370    identifier?: string,371  ): Promise<DiagnosticRequestResult> {372    const report = await withTimeout(373      connection.sendRequest<WorkspaceDiagnosticReport | null>("workspace/diagnostic", {处理语言服务诊断。374        ...(identifier ? { identifier } : {}),375        previousResultIds: [],376      }),377      DIAGNOSTICS_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS,378    ).catch(() => null)379    if (!report) return { handled: false, matched: false, byFile: new Map<string, Diagnostic[]>() }按条件进入分支。380381    const byFile = new Map<string, Diagnostic[]>()382    let matched = false383    for (const item of report.items ?? []) {遍历集合。384      const relatedPath = item.uri ? getFilePath(item.uri) : undefined385      if (!relatedPath || !Array.isArray(item.items)) continue按条件进入分支。386      const existing = byFile.get(relatedPath) ?? []387      byFile.set(relatedPath, existing.concat(item.items))388      matched = matched || relatedPath === filePath389    }390391    return { handled: true, matched, byFile }返回给上一层。392  }393394  function documentPullState() {定义一段可复用逻辑。395    const documentRegistrations = [...diagnosticRegistrations.values()].filter(处理语言服务诊断。396      (registration) => registration.registerOptions?.workspaceDiagnostics !== true,处理语言服务诊断。397    )398    return {返回给上一层。399      documentIdentifiers: [400        ...new Set(documentRegistrations.flatMap((registration) => registration.registerOptions?.identifier ?? [])),401      ],402      supported: hasStaticPullDiagnostics || documentRegistrations.length > 0,处理语言服务诊断。403    }404  }405406  function workspacePullState() {定义一段可复用逻辑。407    const workspaceRegistrations = [...diagnosticRegistrations.values()].filter(处理语言服务诊断。408      (registration) => registration.registerOptions?.workspaceDiagnostics === true,处理语言服务诊断。409    )410    return {返回给上一层。411      workspaceIdentifiers: [412        ...new Set(workspaceRegistrations.flatMap((registration) => registration.registerOptions?.identifier ?? [])),413      ],414      supported: workspaceRegistrations.length > 0,415    }416  }417418  const hasCurrentFileDiagnostics = (filePath: string, results: DiagnosticRequestResult[]) =>处理语言服务诊断。419    results.some((result) => (result.byFile.get(filePath)?.length ?? 0) > 0)420421  async function requestDiagnostics(处理语言服务诊断。422    filePath: string,423    requests: Promise<DiagnosticRequestResult>[],424    done: (results: DiagnosticRequestResult[]) => boolean,425  ) {426    if (!requests.length) return { handled: false, matched: false }按条件进入分支。427428    const results: DiagnosticRequestResult[] = []429    return new Promise<{ handled: boolean; matched: boolean }>((resolve) => {返回给上一层。430      let pending = requests.length431      let resolved = false432      const finish = (merged: { handled: boolean; matched: boolean }, force = false) => {433        if (resolved) return按条件进入分支。434        if (!force && !done(results)) return按条件进入分支。435        resolved = true436        resolve(merged)437      }438439      for (const request of requests) {遍历集合。440        request.then((result) => {441          results.push(result)442          pending -= 1443          const merged = mergeResults(filePath, results)444          finish(merged)445          if (pending === 0) finish(merged, true)按条件进入分支。446        })447      }448    })449  }450451  // LATENCY-CRITICAL: dispatch identifier pulls in parallel and unblock once one452  // batch already produced diagnostics for the current file. Let slower pulls keep453  // merging in the background; do not sequence identifier-by-identifier, and do454  // not add a post-match settle/debounce delay. See PR #23771.455  async function requestDocumentDiagnostics(filePath: string) {处理语言服务诊断。456    const state = documentPullState()457    if (!state.supported) return { handled: false, matched: false }按条件进入分支。458    return requestDiagnostics(处理语言服务诊断。459      filePath,460      [461        requestDiagnosticReport(filePath),462        ...state.documentIdentifiers.map((identifier) => requestDiagnosticReport(filePath, identifier)),463      ],464      (results) => hasCurrentFileDiagnostics(filePath, results),处理语言服务诊断。465    )466  }467468  async function requestFullDiagnostics(filePath: string) {处理语言服务诊断。469    const documentState = documentPullState()470    const workspaceState = workspacePullState()471    if (!documentState.supported && !workspaceState.supported) return { handled: false, matched: false }按条件进入分支。472    return mergeResults(返回给上一层。473      filePath,474      await Promise.all([并行等待多个任务。475        ...(documentState.supported ? [requestWorkspaceDiagnosticReport(filePath)] : []),478        ...workspaceState.workspaceIdentifiers.map((identifier) =>479          requestWorkspaceDiagnosticReport(filePath, identifier),480        ),481      ]),482    )483  }
  1. packages/opencode/src/tool/lsp.ts:37-110
packages/opencode/src/tool/lsp.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/lsp.ts:37-110 
37export const LspTool = Tool.define(声明可调用工具。38  "lsp",39  Effect.gen(function* () {Effect 异步工作流。40    const lsp = yield* LSP.Service处理语言服务诊断。41    const fs = yield* AppFileSystem.Service读写本地文件。42    return {返回给上一层。43      description: DESCRIPTION,44      parameters: Parameters,45      execute: (args: Schema.Schema.Type<typeof Parameters>, ctx: Tool.Context) =>定义并校验数据形状。46        Effect.gen(function* () {Effect 异步工作流。47          const instance = yield* InstanceState.context等待 Effect 结果。48          const file = path.isAbsolute(args.filePath) ? args.filePath : path.join(instance.directory, args.filePath)49          yield* assertExternalDirectoryEffect(ctx, file)等待 Effect 结果。50          const meta =51            args.operation === "workspaceSymbol"52              ? { operation: args.operation }53              : args.operation === "documentSymbol"54                ? { operation: args.operation, filePath: file }55                : { operation: args.operation, filePath: file, line: args.line, character: args.character }56          yield* ctx.ask({进入权限审批。57            permission: "lsp",58            patterns: ["*"],59            always: ["*"],60            metadata: meta,61          })6263          const uri = pathToFileURL(file).href64          const position = { file, line: args.line - 1, character: args.character - 1 }65          const relPath = path.relative(instance.worktree, file)66          const detail =67            args.operation === "workspaceSymbol"68              ? ""69              : args.operation === "documentSymbol"70                ? relPath71                : `${relPath}:${args.line}:${args.character}`72          const title = detail ? `${args.operation} ${detail}` : args.operation7374          const exists = yield* fs.existsSafe(file)读写本地文件。75          if (!exists) throw new Error(`File not found: ${file}`)按条件进入分支。7677          const available = yield* lsp.hasClients(file)等待 Effect 结果。78          if (!available) throw new Error("No LSP server available for this file type.")处理语言服务诊断。7980          yield* lsp.touchFile(file, "document")等待 Effect 结果。8182          const result: unknown[] = yield* (() => {等待 Effect 结果。83            switch (args.operation) {84              case "goToDefinition":85                return lsp.definition(position)返回给上一层。86              case "findReferences":87                return lsp.references(position)返回给上一层。88              case "hover":89                return lsp.hover(position)返回给上一层。90              case "documentSymbol":91                return lsp.documentSymbol(uri)返回给上一层。92              case "workspaceSymbol":93                return lsp.workspaceSymbol(args.query ?? "")返回给上一层。94              case "goToImplementation":95                return lsp.implementation(position)返回给上一层。96              case "prepareCallHierarchy":97                return lsp.prepareCallHierarchy(position)返回给上一层。98              case "incomingCalls":99                return lsp.incomingCalls(position)返回给上一层。100              case "outgoingCalls":101                return lsp.outgoingCalls(position)返回给上一层。102            }103          })()104105          return {返回给上一层。106            title,107            metadata: { result },108            output: result.length === 0 ? `No results found for ${args.operation}` : JSON.stringify(result, null, 2),109          }110        }).pipe(Effect.orDie),Effect 异步工作流。

读完画一条链：edit -> touchFile -> getClients -> notify.open -> wait diagnostics -> Diagnostic.report -> tool output。

15. 面试式自测

Section titled “15. 面试式自测”
  1. 为什么 LSP client 要缓存，而不是每次查询都启动一个 language server？
  2. 如果 language server 启动失败，OpenCode 如何避免反复失败？
  3. 为什么 touchFile 捕获错误而不是让 edit/write 失败？
  4. 为什么 LspTool 查询前还要做权限审批？
  5. diagnostics 是 session 状态的一部分吗？它最终怎样进入下一轮推理？
  6. 如果你要给 mini agent 加 Java 支持，你会在哪里增加 Java language server？

16. 下一步阅读建议

Section titled “16. 下一步阅读建议”

下一章建议读 “UI / TUI / Desktop / IDE”。LSP 和权限都通过事件、tool output 和 session 状态对外呈现，UI 章会看到这些状态如何被不同前端消费。

编辑此页

最近更新： 2026年5月21日

07. Shell / 命令执行 下一页
09. 权限、审批、安全边界
基于 Starlight 构建
